heading: Governing body
label: 170505 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)170505(a)36:2506., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, .July 23, 1984Pub. L. 98–37298 Stat. 1239170505(b)36:2507.170505(c)36:2505 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2506 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2507 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)170505(a)36:2506., , §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, .July 23, 1984Pub. L. 98–37298 Stat. 1239170505(b)36:2507.170505(c)36:2505 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).In subsections (a) and (b), the words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2506 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2507 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Nondiscrimination
children.label: c .—Nondiscrimination
children.text: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.
